objective: Adopt the generic Manifold media lifecycle as an explicit Native Renderer module with its own app feature lock, client identity, lease, display-composite binding, and native OpenXR render sink.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route explicit app-local broker media adoption.
Route Native media lifecycle product and evidence.
Route exact per-app media lock and sink ownership.
Route per-client lock, lease, lifecycle, and recovery closure.

non_scope: Spatial app policy or sink identity.
Camera2 as the Native NET-016 default product.
Stable or device promotion before central NET-016 validation.

acceptance.proof: Project spec, inert default lock, selected conformance lock, and authority map agree on broker-media-client and its shell dependency.
The packaged lifecycle binds Native package/client, app lock SHA, per-client leases, display-composite runtime binding, and native OpenXR sink.
Start/stop/release, replay, owner failure, app death, provider restart, cleanup, and revision/epoch evidence derive from current authority.
acceptance.command: host lifecycle damage matrix and two-Quest suite

validation.command: Native workspace, generated runtime config, and broker client lifecycle source gates
two-Quest Native media lifecycle, recovery, fatal, and cleanup evidence

commit_policy: Keep proposed until MOD-006 is accepted; then claim, validate, and publish with central NET-016.
